intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the current visual state. P1 (String of Nickels), P2 (Mexican Mint), and P4 (Silver Guest) are not visible as living specimens. P3 (Pothos) is the only identifiable anchor, though its health is critical.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No foliage detected in the yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No foliage detected in the black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present: Pothos anchor (rabbit) visible, but plant material is severely diminished.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No foliage detected in the black pot.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P3: The Pothos specimen shows severe chlorosis and structural collapse. The rabbit anchor remains, but the plant is effectively a remnant.
plant_audit.P4: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears dry and compacted across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Significant presence of eggshell fragments in the central black pot, likely an amateur attempt at calcium supplementation or pest deterrent.
biome_observations.lighting_impact: The shift to blue-spectrum LED lighting in later images obscures biological detail, suggesting a potential failure in the primary light source or a shift to a night-cycle observation mode.

temporal_deltas.EARLIEST_to_T-2: Initial state shows a single green stem in the black pot. Soil appears dark.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Severe degradation. The green stem has collapsed or withered. The environment has transitioned to a high-contrast blue light, rendering fine botanical assessment difficult.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of terminal decline. The lack of photosynthetic tissue suggests the plants have either been removed or have succumbed to environmental stress (likely desiccation or light starvation).
anomalies: Total loss of visible foliage in P1, P2, and P4.
Blue-spectrum light shift in final frames.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical collection has suffered a catastrophic failure. From the earliest image, only a single, fragile stem was present. Over the course of the observation period, this stem has vanished or withered entirely. The pots are now essentially empty vessels of soil. The presence of eggshells suggests an intervention that failed to prevent the collapse of the biome.
